title: Audit standalone Pi Daemon completion surface
description: Inventory the Pi Daemon repository and its current implementation, compare it with Cacophony's Pi daemon/SKD integration, identify gaps required for a standalone Cacophony-independent multi-session Pi SDK host, update PLAN.md with a concrete remaining-work board, and file actionable follow-up beads. Requested directly by Harry on 2026-07-14.
creator: ms-mac:pi-daemon:ms-mac-pi-daemon-pidm-dev-msm-2

title: Audit standalone Pi Daemon completion surface
description: Operator-requested architecture and implementation audit. Compare the standalone service, protocol, durability, isolation, tests, packaging, and operations docs against the real Cacophony Pi daemon consumer/integration source. Keep Pi Daemon Cacophony-independent. Update PLAN.md with evidence-backed remaining work and register actionable implementation beads in dependency order; distinguish completed behavior, integration-only Cacophony work, release operations, and true Pi Daemon gaps.
creator: ms-mac:pi-daemon:ms-mac-pi-daemon-pidm-dev-msm-0

title: Make automated npm dependency updates Nix-aware
description: Dependabot PR 6 updates package-lock.json but cannot refresh flake.nix npmDepsHash, so both Nix jobs fail with a fixed-output hash mismatch. The same grouped update exposes stricter Node 26 socket data callback types in src/client.ts and src/server.ts. Add a supported maintenance path that refreshes the pinned Nix hash, adapts the socket chunk typing without weakening runtime bounds, and leaves grouped dependency PRs with actionable CI rather than guaranteed red Nix checks. Discovered during the post-v0.1.0 release-candidate health audit on 2026-07-14.
creator: ms-mac:pi-daemon:ms-mac-pi-daemon-pidm-dev-msm-0

bead.title: Restrict GitHub CI to self-hosted runners
bead.description:
Configure GitHub Actions CI workflows to run exclusively on self-hosted runners, matching the pattern used by the cacophony project and other caco projects.

Acceptance criteria:
- All CI workflow jobs use `runs-on` targeting the self-hosted runner label(s) rather than GitHub-hosted runners (e.g. ubuntu-latest).
- Configuration is consistent with how cacophony and other caco projects define their self-hosted runners.
- CI runs successfully on the self-hosted infrastructure after the change.
bead.creator: ms-mac:cacophony:harryaskham

bead.title: Audit Cacophony integration and deployment gaps for standalone Pi Daemon
bead.description: Trace current Cacophony source related to Pi daemon and Pi SDK session hosting, infer the expected API/lifecycle and rollout behavior for the standalone service, audit Pi Daemon packaging/release/deployment gaps, and send concrete file/line findings to the standalone audit owner on bd-62e2c5. Coordinated sub-scope of Harry's 2026-07-14 project audit.
bead.creator: ms-mac:pi-daemon:ms-mac-pi-daemon-pidm-dev-msm-2

bead.title: Audit Cacophony consumer contract for standalone Pi Daemon
bead.description: Coordinated sub-audit for Harry's completion review. Read current Cacophony source related to Pi/Pico runtime spawning, wake/resume, profile/model/auth/session persistence, inbox/heartbeat delivery, shutdown, metrics, and deployment. Extract evidence-backed requirements for a standalone Cacophony-independent Pi Daemon API and clearly separate Pi Daemon work from Cacophony-only adapter/deployment work. Send file/line findings to bd-1245ab owner; do not edit Pi Daemon PLAN.md.
bead.creator: ms-mac:pi-daemon:ms-mac-pi-daemon-pidm-dev-msm-0
